data.title: Bearish Sentiment Hits 7-Week High, Mimicking 35-Year Old Record Which Marked The Bottom Of The October 1990 Bear Market
data.description: Despite a weekly decrease in negative sentiment, the latest AAII survey showed bearishness leading bullish and neutral views at 58.9%.

data.title: Mark Cuban Reminds Americans: 'Elections Have Consequences' Amid Trump Tariff Push
data.description: Mark Cuban warns of consequences of Trump's tariffs on businesses and economy, highlighting potential job losses and investment restrictions.

data.title: Lawmakers Slam Mark Zuckerberg After Meta Whistleblower Details Alleged Censorship And China Collusion: 'Stop Trying To Hide Behind Your Lawyers And Millions Of Dollars In Legal Fees'
data.description: Meta whistleblower Sarah Wynn-Williams accused CEO Mark Zuckerberg of censoring critics and collaborating with China.

data.title: Asia And Europe Markets Rally After Trump's Tariff U-Turn, Gold Nears Record High - Global Markets Today While US Slept
data.description: U.S. markets rally with positive earnings, strong demand, and tariff pause. Mortgage applications surge. Nikkei posts biggest gain since 2008.

data.title: Amazon's 1st Kuiper Satellite Launch Scrubbed Due to Tech Glitch, Bad Weather
data.description: Amazon's Kuiper satellite launch was scrubbed due to bad weather. This setback delays the company's plans for space-based internet service.
